ocr_findings.description: Answer line at bottom of page: image shows '問題4-5 エ　問題4-6 ウ　問題4-7 エ'. OCR reads '問題4-5 工 問題4-6 ウ 問題4-7 工' — the answer letter 'エ' (katakana) is rendered as '工' (kanji for 'work/craft') for Q4-5 and Q4-7. This is a character-level substitution (エ→工) that changes the answer letter meaning. Both occurrences of 'エ' are affected.
The chapter tab vertical text '第4章 技術戦略マネジメント' on the right margin is present in the image but rendered as part of the header line in OCR (line 3) — acceptable capture of side-tab content.

reviewer_notes: Page contains three exam questions (問題4-5 through 4-7) with ア/イ/ウ/エ choices. All question stems and choice text are faithfully reproduced. The key defect is the answer line: 'エ' (katakana, the correct answer letter) is misread as '工' (kanji) for questions 4-5 and 4-7 — this is a med-severity answer_line_loss issue because it corrupts the answer key. The stage-3 fix for answer line preservation appears to have not caught this エ→工 confusion for this page.
